title: Community session: The evolution of monday WorkForms
excerpt: :thinking: Curious about the progression of WorkForms since its development in 2022? Eager to see how the layout we’re familiar with today came to life in August '23? Wondering about the innovative minds behind these dev…

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Curious about the progression of WorkForms since its development in 2022? Eager to see how the layout we’re familiar with today came to life in August '23? Wondering about the innovative minds behind these developments?

Join us for a captivating Zoom event dedicated to the journey and transformation of WorkForms - one of the most useful tools to collect and survey data. In this session you will hear directly from the WorkForms team about different use cases and the upcoming roadmap for monday WorkForms.

Have a question for the team?

Frame 12611596871067×604 105 KB

posts.author: jstokes (Joanne Stokes)
posts.cookedHtml: When I registered, the registration form and invite show this on April 17, not April 25. Please confirm which is accurate.

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Joanna! Sorry about the confusion. We had to move the date to May 7th. It will be a great session and your registration automatically adjusted so need to sign up again!

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Everyone! Yes the recording can be found here! You can also comment your thoughts on the video!

The evolution of monday WorkForms (session recording) Community events
Did you know that since its new layout release in 2022, WorkForms has become an integral tool for teams conducting surveys and collecting data. In this session, the co-founders of monday WorkForms explore the origins, the current landscape, and the WorkForm features coming soon. [The evolution of monday WorkForms] Any questions for @Galit-monday.com or @Or about monday WorkForms? Ask below!
